evidence_source: src/drmTMB.cpp:2584-2604 (model_type==16, log-link eta_mu=X_mu*beta_mu); R/drmTMB.R:4121-4320 (drm_build_tweedie_ls_spec); tests/testthat/test-tweedie-location-scale.R:27-56 (single-seed recovery, |coef-truth|<0.15); tests/testthat/test-phase18-tweedie-fixed-effect.R:53-92 (mu:(Intercept)/mu:x Wald rows, interval_status=ok)
notes: Point recovery (single seed) and feasible Wald CIs (n_rep=1 smoke grid, 5 conditions); NOT a coverage-gate run. docs/dev-log/after-task/2026-05-28-phase18-tweedie-fixed-effect-grid-writer.md:26,59 states these are 'smoke artifacts, not coverage claims'.

evidence_source: R/drmTMB.R:1978-1986 (drm_validate_reml_spec: cli_abort unless model_type is gaussian or biv_gaussian)
notes: Generic non-Gaussian REML gate; fires before any dpar/effect-type/formula check, so it blocks REML unconditionally for every tweedie row in this census (not re-derived per row below).

evidence_source: src/drmTMB.cpp:2586,2589-2592 (log_sigma=X_sigma*beta_sigma, phi=sigma^2); R/drmTMB.R:4121-4320; tests/testthat/test-tweedie-location-scale.R:27-56 (|coef(sigma)-truth|<0.15); tests/testthat/test-phase18-tweedie-fixed-effect.R:53-92 (sigma:(Intercept)/sigma:z Wald rows, interval_status=ok)
notes: Same evidentiary basis as mu-fixed: point recovery + feasible (uncoverage-validated) Wald CIs. Public sigma = sqrt(Tweedie dispersion phi) per R/family.R:161-166.

evidence_source: R/drmTMB.R:1978-1986
notes: Same generic non-Gaussian REML gate as mu-fixed row.

evidence_source: src/drmTMB.cpp:2586,2590 (nu=1+plogis(eta_nu)); R/drmTMB.R:4278-4286 (dedicated gate: cli_abort unless ncol(X_nu)==1 and colnames(X_nu)=='(Intercept)'); tests/testthat/test-tweedie-location-scale.R:27-45 (|predict(nu)-truth|<0.12); tests/testthat/test-phase18-tweedie-fixed-effect.R:83-90 (nu:(Intercept) Wald row, interval_status=ok)
notes: nu is restricted to intercept-only by a DEDICATED validator (R/drmTMB.R:4278-4286), not merely a deferred-RE gate: nu ~ z (a fixed covariate, no bar term) is rejected too, same as nu ~ (1|id). R/family.R:167-169 documents predictor-dependent nu as 'planned but unsupported'.

evidence_source: R/drmTMB.R:1978-1986
notes: Same generic non-Gaussian REML gate; moot in practice since nu is intercept-only regardless of estimator.

evidence_source: R/methods.R:5035-5066 (drm_dpar_link switch has no biv_tweedie/tweedie2 case); R/family.R:158-169 (docstring: 'bivariate Tweedie models ... remain planned but unsupported')
notes: Representative row for the whole bivariate axis: no biv_tweedie model_type exists anywhere in src/drmTMB.cpp or R/methods.R; the family is univariate-only end to end.
